data.content:
Implementation plan:
1. Create a dedicated worktree and install dependencies with bun install --frozen-lockfile.
2. Inspect src/components/beat-state-overview.tsx, src/components/beat-columns.tsx, src/components/use-overview-column-watermark.ts, and related tests to understand how column visibility and width watermarks are currently tracked.
3. Extend the overview column state so once a column has been introduced it remains renderable at count 0 until explicitly hidden. Keep the existing width watermark behavior separate from manual visibility state.
4. Add a compact hide control to empty introduced columns, wire it to mark that column hidden, and suppress the control whenever the column count is nonzero. Ensure a hidden column reappears automatically when its count becomes nonzero.
5. Add or update focused tests around introduced-empty visibility, hide action, and reappearance/control suppression when count returns.
6. Run focused tests first, then bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build.
